body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Mitigating, Burnout..

**Mitigating Burnout.** — Surg Clin North Am. PMID: 31446908. DOI: 10.1016/j.suc.2019.06.015. Burnout is characterized by emotional exhaustion, depersonalization, and areduced sense of personal accomplishment. All physicians, and especially surgeons, are at risk for developing burnout. The best strategies for mitigating burnout mimic amodern approach to medicine: the development of preventive practices to protect, promote, and maintain health and well-being.
